arts.ttl: Real Sociedad pair to miss Barcelona clash through suspension
arts.sum: Two important members of the first-team ranks at La Liga outfit Real Sociedad will play no part in the club’s upcoming meeting with Barcelona. This comes owing to developments in…

arts.ttl: Chelsea eye HUGE summer deal with Barcelona 'ready to sell'
arts.sum: Barcelona are ready to sell Alejandro Balde this summer amid interest from Chelsea and Newcastle United, according to reports in Spain. That is according to Spanish publication Todo Fichajes, who claim that both Chelsea and Newcastle are closely monitoring Balde’s situation at Camp Nou as they ponder a possible summer bid.

arts.ttl: WATCH: Birthday cakes and slaps! Barca celebrate as Flick turns 60
arts.sum: Flick’s birthday was also celebrated at the club with the coach running through a tunnel of the players who were happy to hand out the usual slaps. Barcelona fans and players have been helping manager Hansi Flick celebrate his birthday as the German coach turns 60.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid ‘have been asking’ about Lamine Yamal’s situation at Barcelona
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga champions Real Madrid have seemingly set their sights on the most audacious of transfer swoops, for Barcelona star Lamine Yamal. This comes amid confirmation that…

arts.ttl: Barcelona News: LaLiga president Javier Tebas claims Blaugrana 'should be relegated'
arts.sum: LaLiga president Javier Tebas believes that Barcelona would and should have been relegated for their involvement in the 'Negreira Case' had it not been for the statute of limitations expiring. Speaking at a Europa Press meeting, LaLiga president Javier Tebas has now revealed that Barcelona would have received a severe penalty had the statute of limitations regarding sporting punishments not expired by the time the matter was discovered in February 2023.

arts.ttl: FC Barcelona 25-26 Home, Away, Third & Fourth Anthem Jackets Leaked
arts.sum: Footy Headlines can leak the full set of 4 Barcelona 25-26 anthem jackets, matching the colors of the 4 kits.

arts.ttl: Tebas insists Olmo ‘should not finish La Liga’ with Barca
arts.sum: Both sides are still waiting for a final decision from the CSD, but Tebas has said in a new interview that Olmo shouldn’t be playing for Barcelona right now. La Liga’s president has already made it crystal clear he wants Olmo unregistered for the second half of the season after Barca gained an injunction in the winter to allow him to play.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick provides Lamine Yamal injury update before Atlético clash
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has provided an update on the wellbeing of star winger Lamine Yamal. This comes after the youngster was left with a nasty wound on his…

arts.ttl: Flick hopeful Yamal is fit to face Atleti in Copa
arts.sum: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick is optimistic Lamine Yamal will be fit to face Atlético Madrid in the first leg of the Copa del Rey semifinal at the Olympic Stadium on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Flick offers fitness update on Yamal & Olmo ahead of Atletico clash
arts.sum: Barcelona have had to take care with Dani Olmo this season too, and Flick says he could start against Atletico and coming off the bench to score at Las Palmas . Flick also says that all players need to be protected after Yamal showed off a bloodied sock after the weekend’s match .
